expression.label: text1
expression.exp: "著色正方形的數目 = " + (Count01 + Count02 + Count03 + Count04 + Count05 + Count06 + Count07 + Count08 + Count09 + Count10 + Count11 + Count12 + Count13 + Count14 + Count15) + ""

expression.label: text3
expression.exp: " 圖形內的空白位置，找出圖F的面積。"
